title: Telemedicine | Piel en Armonia
description: Remote dermatology consultation with triage, escalation criteria, and clinical continuity in Quito.
heading: Dermatology telemedicine
lead: Telemedicine works when it adds diagnosis clarity and shortens decision time.

thesis.title: Online consultation when criteria supports it
thesis.body: The remote route defines clear limits: what can be managed online, what needs monitoring, and when to escalate in clinic.

internalMessage.description: We assess context, risk, and progression to decide whether you continue remotely or need in-clinic care.

blocks.title: How it works
items: You share clinical history and contextual photos.
We define priority and probability of remote resolution.
We provide an initial plan and review timing when needed.
If risk signals appear, we escalate to immediate in-clinic care.

blocks.title: When escalation is required
items: Need for an in-clinic diagnostic procedure

initiatives.title: Visual triage
initiatives.copy: Early reading with clinical images to prioritize risk and response time.

initiatives.title: Flare control
initiatives.copy: Remote adjustments in inflammatory cases to avoid progression between reviews.

initiatives.title: In-clinic escalation
initiatives.copy: Referral to clinic when lesion behavior or pain requires direct evaluation.

initiatives.title: Quito continuity
initiatives.copy: Hybrid route for Quito patients with remote follow-up and timely in-clinic review.

bookingStatus.title: Transactional schedule in update
bookingStatus.description: Booking form returns in the next phase. For now, this route stays active for first clinical guidance.
